title: Want to create a weighted rating with forms

posts.author: Jaimini (Jaimini Mistry)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a workform, however for certain questions when they pick an option it will give them a certain amounts of points.

For eg when the answer to a question is yes it should give them 1 point and when the answer is No they will get 0 points

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Jaimini

Do you want to show the point count on the form? If not, you can use a formula to display different options as numbers.

posts.author: Jaimini (Jaimini Mistry)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, I have been using formula column and have created conditional formulas for each question.

posts.author: paul598kline (Paul Kline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jaimini Mistry:

I have created a workform, however for certain questions when they pick an option it will give them a certain amounts of points.

For eg when the answer to a question is yes it should give them 1 point and when the answer is No they will get 0 points

Hello,
To assign points in your snaptik tiktok downloader workform based on responses, configure the form’s logic to award 1 point for “Yes” and 0 points for “No” answers. This way, each selection automatically updates the total score.

Best Regards,
Paul Kline
